name: Twitcharr
description: Twitch live-TV lineup for Dispatcharr. Add Twitch channel names by comma or line break, optionally use discovery tokens, then sync Channels, Streams and XMLTV guide rows. Twitch metadata is fetched anonymously; no Twitch OAuth, Client ID, Client Secret or account login is required.
author: eliasbruno124

fields.label: Twitch channels / discovery
fields.placeholder:
gronkh, papaplatte, knossi
top:de:25
game:Just Chatting:10
search:knossi
fields.description: Add Twitch channel names with commas or line breaks. Full twitch.tv URLs also work. Optional discovery tokens: top, top:de:25, game:<category>:10, search:<text>:10. Do not paste Twitch OAuth tokens or account credentials; Twitcharr does not use them.

fields.label: Trending countries
fields.description: Optional. Comma-separated language codes. Twitcharr adds the top live streams for each code on every refresh. Set 'Trending per country' below to choose how many.

fields.label: Trending per country
fields.description: How many live streams to add for each language code above. 0 disables this source.

fields.label: Global trending
fields.description: How many globally trending live streams to add on each refresh. 0 disables this source.

fields.label: Channel group name
fields.description: Dispatcharr ChannelGroup used for all managed Twitch channels.

fields.label: Starting channel number
fields.description: First channel number for newly created channels. Existing channel numbers are kept.

fields.label: Stream quality
fields.description: adaptive builds a Streamlink fallback chain from your measured or manual bandwidth. Fixed values are passed to Streamlink as-is.

fields.label: Connection bandwidth (Mbps)
fields.description: Used by adaptive quality. 0 means use the last measured value, or a conservative fallback if nothing has been measured.

fields.label: Bandwidth safety margin (%)
fields.description: Extra headroom above Twitch's nominal bitrate when adaptive quality chooses a variant. Higher is safer; lower allows higher quality.

fields.label: Fastest possible startup
fields.description: Uses more aggressive Streamlink startup parameters for quicker channel switching.

fields.label: Low-latency mode
fields.description: Enables Twitch low-latency Streamlink options.

fields.label: Show offline channels
fields.description: ON keeps offline streamers in Dispatcharr. OFF removes offline streamers during sync and re-creates them when they go live.

fields.label: Offline channel icon
fields.description: Image used for offline channels and the no-streams placeholder. Leave empty for the built-in Twitcharr offline card; enter 'none' to disable the icon.

fields.label: Always keep a 'no streams online' channel
fields.description: When nobody is live, keep one placeholder channel so Live TV is not empty. The placeholder is removed when a real stream is live.

fields.label: Use live preview thumbnails as channel icon
fields.description: ON uses Twitch's live preview image as the channel icon. OFF uses game art or the profile picture.

fields.label: Use profile picture for Just Chatting
fields.description: Only used when live preview thumbnails are OFF. Shows the profile picture for Just Chatting streams.

fields.label: EPG refresh interval (minutes)
fields.description: How often the scheduler refreshes live status, guide data and channel icons. Minimum: 1 minute.

fields.label: Daily ttv.lol update time
fields.description: Server-local time in HH:MM format for the daily streamlink-ttvlol update check.

fields.label: ttv.lol proxy servers
fields.description: Comma-separated ttv.lol playlist proxy URLs passed to Streamlink. Clear the field to disable the proxy list.

fields.label: Enable automatic scheduler
fields.description: ON refreshes Twitch status and guide data on the interval above and checks ttv.lol daily.

fields.label: Emby / Jellyfin URL
fields.description: Optional. Base URL of your Emby or Jellyfin server. Used to trigger the server's Refresh Guide task after EPG refreshes.

fields.label: Emby / Jellyfin access token
fields.description: Optional media-server token for Emby/Jellyfin only. Not a Twitch key. Required when an Emby/Jellyfin URL is set.

fields.label: Discord webhook for go-live alerts
fields.description: Optional. Posts a Discord embed when a configured streamer changes from offline to live. Use 'Send Discord test' to verify the webhook.

fields.label: Auto-check for plugin updates
fields.description: ON checks GitHub for releases every 6 hours.

fields.label: Auto-apply plugin updates
fields.description: ON automatically downloads and applies a newer GitHub release after the scheduled update check. Reload plugins or restart Dispatcharr so Python uses the new code.

fields.label: Data directory
fields.description: Folder for twitch.xmltv, scheduler state and the downloaded streamlink-ttvlol plugin. Change only for custom Dispatcharr data paths.

actions.label: Sync Twitch lineup
actions.description: Runs the full sync: update ttv.lol if needed, refresh Twitch data, write guide rows, sync channels and trigger configured integrations.

actions.label: Refresh guide
actions.description: Fetches current Twitch status and writes XMLTV plus Dispatcharr EPG rows. Also triggers Emby/Jellyfin and Discord if configured.

actions.label: Sync channels only
actions.description: Creates, updates or removes managed Channel and Stream rows without rewriting the guide.

actions.label: Full refresh
actions.description: Runs ttv.lol update check, channel sync and guide refresh. Twitch data is fetched once and reused.

actions.label: System status / health-check
actions.description: Shows scheduler state, last refresh times, Twitch API status, Streamlink, ttv.lol, proxy latency, media-server status and managed object counts.

actions.label: Test connection
actions.description: Checks settings, anonymous Twitch metadata access, optional Emby/Jellyfin access and Streamlink presence. Confirms that no Twitch OAuth or account login is needed.

actions.label: Test ttv.lol proxies
actions.description: Probes every configured ttv.lol proxy URL and reports HTTP code plus latency.

actions.label: Send Discord test notification
actions.description: Sends one test embed to the configured Discord webhook.

actions.label: Measure bandwidth
actions.description: Runs quick Cloudflare download probes, saves the measured Mbps value and updates the adaptive StreamProfile.

actions.label: Refresh Emby / Jellyfin guide
actions.description: Triggers the Refresh Guide scheduled task on the configured Emby or Jellyfin server.

actions.label: Force-update ttv.lol
actions.description: Downloads the latest streamlink-ttvlol twitch.py regardless of the cached ETag.

actions.label: Check for plugin update
actions.description: Checks GitHub Releases and reports whether a newer plugin version exists.

actions.label: Apply plugin update
actions.description: Downloads the latest release and overwrites the plugin code in place. Reload plugins or restart the container afterwards.

confirm.title: Update the plugin from GitHub?
confirm.message: This downloads the latest Twitcharr release from GitHub and overwrites the plugin's Python code. Your settings, the XMLTV file, and the cached streamlink-ttvlol plugin are preserved.

actions.label: Donate / Support
actions.description: Returns the PayPal support link for this plugin's author.

actions.label: Remove managed objects
actions.description: Deletes managed StreamProfile, EPG source, Channels and Streams. The plugin files and saved settings remain.

confirm.title: Remove all managed objects?
confirm.message: This permanently deletes the Twitch StreamProfile, EPG source, and every Channel and Stream this plugin created. The plugin and its settings remain in place.
